Title: English Crime forms visible and accessible
Description: Verify ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126 are visible on the Crime endorsement list and accessible for English submissions.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a new business Crime submission under Financial Lines.
3. Navigate to the Forms tab.
4. Click Add Endorsement.
5. Search for ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126.
6. Add both forms and click Fill-in Details.
Expected Results:
1. ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126 are available in the endorsement list.
2. Both forms can be added successfully.
3. Fill-in Details opens correctly for each English form.
Source: OptimusCore/01_BaseRepo/UserStory/1705.md | Acceptance: English Crime forms available and fillable

Title: Required fields enforce entry on English Crime no callback form
Description: Verify that required fields on ZC 10827 U 0126 cannot be saved without valid amounts.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a new business Crime submission under Financial Lines.
3. Navigate to the Forms tab and add ZC 10827 U 0126.
4. Click Fill-in Details.
5. Leave Item 2 and Item 4 blank and attempt to save.
Expected Results:
1. Validation messages appear for Item 2 and Item 4.
2. The form cannot be saved until valid amounts are entered.
Source: OptimusCore/01_BaseRepo/UserStory/1705.md | Acceptance: required fields validation for Fraudulent Impersonation forms

Title: Invalid amount values rejected on English PCL callback form
Description: Verify the ZC-PCL-11744 U 1225 form rejects invalid amount values and displays appropriate error messages.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a new business Private Company Select submission under Financial Lines.
3. Navigate to the Forms tab and add ZC-PCL-11744 U 1225.
4. Click Fill-in Details.
5. Enter negative values, text, or malformed amounts into Limit of Liability and Deductible.
6. Attempt to save.
Expected Results:
1. The system prevents saving when invalid values are entered.
2. Error messages display for invalid Limit of Liability and Deductible entries.
Source: OptimusCore/01_BaseRepo/UserStory/1705.md | Acceptance: amount field validation for PCL forms

Title: Boundary test for minimum and large amount values
Description: Verify the Fraudulent Impersonation forms accept boundary amount values and reject amounts outside allowed ranges.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a new business Crime submission under Financial Lines.
3. Add ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126.
4. Click Fill-in Details and enter zero or a very large amount into Item 2 and Item 4.
5. Save the form.
6. Repeat for ZC-PCL-11743 U 1225 and ZC-PCL-11744 U 1225.
Expected Results:
1. The forms accept zero or valid upper boundary amounts if allowed by business rules.
2. Amounts outside allowed ranges are rejected with validation errors.
Source: OptimusCore/01_BaseRepo/UserStory/1705.md | Acceptance: boundary validation for Fraudulent Impersonation amounts

Title: Preview and document generation includes data for English Crime forms
Description: Verify preview and generated output include ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126 with entered values for English submissions.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a new business Crime submission under Financial Lines.
3. Add ZC 10827 U 0126 and ZC 10828 U 0126.
4. Complete Item 2 and Item 4 values.
5. Select English language and click Preview.
6. Generate the quote or binder document.
Expected Results:
1. Preview displays both forms correctly in English.
2. The generated document includes the forms and the entered amount values.
Source: OptimusCore/01_BaseRepo/UserStory/1705.md | Acceptance: preview and document output for English Crime forms

Title: Form visibility restricted to appropriate product and language
Description: Verify that Crime forms do not appear for unrelated products and that PCL forms do not appear when the product is not Private Company Select.
Steps:
1. Login to EZDocs.
2. Create or open a Binder submission under a non-Crime Financial Lines product.
3. Navigate to the Forms tab and click Add Endorsement.
4. Search for Crime forms.
5. Create or open a Binder submission under a non-PCL product.
6. Search for PCL forms.
Expected Results:
1. Crime forms do not appear for unrelated product selections.
2. PCL forms do not appear for unrelated non-Private Company Select products.
3. Form visibility is restricted to the correct business lines.
